## Severity
- [ ] Critical (E1xx) — system cannot continue
- [ ] High (E2xx) — core functionality degraded
- [ ] Medium (E3xx) — non-critical feature impaired
- [ ] Low (E4xx) — cosmetic or informational

## Component
- [ ] Data Generator (`agent/data_generator.py`)
- [ ] Metrics Calculator (`agent/metrics_calculator.py`)
- [ ] Dashboard (`dashboard/index.html`)
- [ ] Executive Deck (`docs/executive_deck.html`)
- [ ] Agent Orchestration (`agent/agent.py`)
- [ ] Documentation
